title: Pi-ATAC Protocol for Single Cell Analysis
author: Xingqi Chen
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.q6gdzbw

steps.title: Remove PBS from dish, but keep on ice
steps.instruction: Remove PBS from dish, but keep on ice.

steps.title: Add single cell dissociation solution to...
steps.instruction: Add single cell dissociation solution to dish (for most tissues: 200 U/ml Collagenase in HBSS-FBS (1%)).

steps.title: Try to pipet with 10 ml...
steps.instruction: Try to pipet with 10 ml pipet, fill into 15ml tube.

steps.title: Incubate 15 ml tube in 37°C...
steps.instruction: Incubate 15 ml tube in 37°C incubator rotating (depending on amount and type of tissue). Undetermined, Incubation 00:15:00, Incubation

steps.title: Spin down for 5 min at 1000 rpm
steps.instruction: Spin down for 5 min at 1000 rpm. 00:05:00, Spin down

steps.title: Use a glass Pasteur pipet to...
steps.instruction: Use a glass Pasteur pipet to mechanically disrupt remaining clogs, transfer single cells to a 75µm strainer into a new tube (50 ml or 15 ml).

steps.title: Count cells
steps.instruction: Count cells.

steps.title: Aspirate supernatant
steps.instruction: Aspirate supernatant.

steps.title: Spin down desired amount of cells
steps.instruction: Spin down desired amount of cells.

steps.title: Add 2 ml HBSS –FBS (no collagenase) solution
steps.instruction: Add 2 ml HBSS –FBS (no collagenase) solution. HBSS – 1% FBS (no collagenase) solution Contributed by users undetermined, HBSS –FBS (no collagenase) solution

steps.title: Resuspend in 100 µl PBS (for...
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 100 µl PBS (for up to 200 000 cells). PBS Contributed by users undetermined, PBS

steps.title: Fix cells for 10 min at...
steps.instruction: Fix cells for 10 min at RT using 100 µl 2%PFA. 2%PFA Contributed by users undetermined, 2%PFA 00:10:00, Fixing cells

steps.title: Quench reaction using 1 volume Glycin (here 200 µl)
steps.instruction: Quench reaction using 1 volume Glycin (here 200 µl). undetermined, 1.25 M Glycerin Glycine, sodium salt Gold Biotechnology Catalog #G-450

steps.title: Spin down
steps.instruction: Spin down.

steps.title: Permeabilize cells using buffer containing 0
steps.instruction: Permeabilize cells using buffer containing 0.1% NP40, no incubation, immediately spin 5 min 1200 rpm. 00:05:00, Spin

steps.title: If staining is desired
steps.instruction: If staining is desired: stain with antibodies here.

steps.title: Spin down
steps.instruction: Spin down.

steps.title: ATAC
steps.instruction: ATAC: (for 50,000 cells) 25 µl 2xTD, 22,5 µl H 2 O, 2.5 µl Tn5 → 30 min at 37 °C undetermined, 2xTD undetermined, H2O undetermined, Tn5 Undetermined 00:30:00 Nextera DNA library preparation kit 24 samples Contributed by users Catalog #FC-121-1030

steps.title: Stop reaction by adding 40 mM EDTA
steps.instruction: Stop reaction by adding 40 mM EDTA: 500 mM Stock: 1:12.5 0.5M EDTA Contributed by users Catalog #AM92606

steps.title: Spin down for 5 minutes at 1200 rpm
steps.instruction: Spin down for 5 minutes at 1200 rpm. 00:05:00, Spin down

steps.title: Resuspend in PBS – place on ice
steps.instruction: Resuspend in PBS – place on ice. PBS Contributed by users

steps.title: Add Proteinase K 200µg/µl to reverse...
steps.instruction: Add Proteinase K 200µg/µl to reverse x-link buffer = 1:100 from 20 mg/ml Stock. Proteinase K Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #EO0491

steps.title: quick-spin the plates to move all buffer to bottom
steps.instruction: quick-spin the plates to move all buffer to bottom

steps.title: Set up single cell 96 or...
steps.instruction: Set up single cell 96 or 384 well sort at a BD FACS AriaII or similar and in Diva software check index sort box.

steps.title: If stained
steps.instruction: If stained: measure controls (in bulk): e.g. unstained, FMO, uniquely stained samples. then measure and record fluorescence intensity.

steps.title: Spin down plates immediately after sort
steps.instruction: Spin down plates immediately after sort.

steps.title: Use heat sealer for sealing plates
steps.instruction: Use heat sealer for sealing plates.

steps.title: 60°C reverse x-link O
steps.instruction: 60°C reverse x-link O.N. (min 4 h) in incubator or PCR cycler. Undetermined, reverse x-link O.N. 04:00:00, reverse x-link O.N.

steps.title: Inactivate Proteinease K for 10 min at 80°C
steps.instruction: Inactivate Proteinease K for 10 min at 80°C. Undetermined, ProteinaseK inactivation 00:10:00, ProteinaseK inactivation

steps.title: PCR
steps.instruction: PCR: 100 wells/plate: per well: 25 µl NEBNext PCR MM, 2.5 µl Ad1, 2.5 µl Ad2 individual Primerstock concentration: 25 µM undetermined, NEB MM undetermined, Ad1 undetermined, Ad2 NEBNext High-Fidelity 2X PCR Master Mix - 250 rxns New England Biolabs Catalog #M0541L

steps.title: Cycling conditions
steps.instruction: Cycling conditions: %s %s 72°C 5min 98°C 30 s 98°C 10 s 20 cycles 63°C 30 s 72°C 1 min

steps.title: Cleanup using MinElute vacuum
steps.instruction: Cleanup using MinElute vacuum: pool wells into a reservior, add PB (6ml /96 well plate) Wash with PE (10 ml/96well plate), spin down, elute in 12 µl EB per 96 well plate. undetermined, EB (per plate) MinElute Reaction Cleanup Kit Qiagen Catalog #28204

steps.title: Library quantification using KAPA and BioAnalyzer
steps.instruction: Library quantification using KAPA and BioAnalyzer. If required library cleanup using PAGE gel

steps.title: If using tissue
steps.instruction: If using tissue: take out tissue and put on 10 cm dish filled with 10 ml PBS on ice. Weigh

steps.title: Prepare 96-well plates with 25 µl...
steps.instruction: Prepare 96-well plates with 25 µl reverse x-link buffer per well. undetermined, reverse x-link buffer (per well)

steps.title: Cut tissue in small pieces using...
steps.instruction: Cut tissue in small pieces using a scalpel or razor blade on ice.

steps.title: Please see the "before start" section...
steps.instruction: Please see the "before start" section of the Guidelines for buffers and solutions to prepare prior to start.
